# nim-results 0.5.1 — Section Index
# Source: .claude/llms/nim-results/llms-full.txt (1640 lines)

## Type Definitions
- ResultError[E], ResultDefect, Result[T, E]: lines 7-340
- Opt[T] alias (Result[T, void]): lines 340-395

## Internal Helpers
- raiseResultOk, raiseResultError, raiseResultDefect: lines 400-440

## Constructors
- ok (type + shorthand): lines 451-512
- err (type + shorthand): lines 471-512

## Predicates
- isOk, isErr: lines 513-520

## Combinators
- map (4 overloads: T->T1, T->void, void->T1, void->void): lines 522-588
- flatMap (2 overloads: T->T1, void->T1): lines 590-612
- mapErr (4 overloads): lines 614-666
- mapConvert, mapCast: lines 668-728
- mapConvertErr, mapCastErr: lines 702-728
- and, or, orErr: lines 730-791
- catch, capture: lines 793-829

## Equality
- == (3 overloads): lines 831-860

## Value Access
- value (raises Defect on err): lines 863-890
- [] (alias for value): lines 892-900
- unsafeValue: lines 902-910
- tryValue (raises exception bridge): lines 912-930
- expect (raises with custom message): lines 933-982
- get (alias for value, or with default): lines 1072-1101
- valueOr (template, lazy, error access): lines 1267-1303 / 1396-1432

- error (raises Defect on ok): lines 998-1020
- tryError: lines 1021-1040
- unsafeError: lines 1042-1050
- errorOr (template, lazy, value access): lines 1305-1322 / 1434-1450

## Conversion
- optValue, optError: lines 1052-1070

- flatten: lines 1453-1462

- ? (prefix, early return): lines 1533-1610

## Utility
